response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r3c4's offer of 0.625 kWh aligns with generous sharing policy and critical neighborhood distress; accepting maximizes coordinated support to depleting peers within geographic circle.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a OFFER from r3c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.625}. Their rationale: SoC 16.44/37 kWh (0.44 frac) above 0.35 threshold; sharing 2.50 kW via geographic circle to below-mean-SoC peer..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in critical distress; six peers are near depletion (20–25% SoC) and will fail within 1–2 hours without urgent coordinated support. Only r3c4 has substantial reserves. Aggressive sharing to geographic circle is essential..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
